data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Instagram deploys a microservices architecture to handle various functionalities such as user management, image processing, notifications, and analytics.
data.technical_spec: Decoupled services, API communication, horizontal scaling.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Implements CDNs to ensure rapid content delivery and improve loading times for images and videos globally.
data.technical_spec: CDNs like Akamai, Cloudflare; caching, edge servers.

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: Employs database sharding to distribute user data across multiple databases to balance the load and enhance performance.
data.technical_spec: Relational databases, horizontal partitioning, shard key.

data.title: GraphQL API
data.description: Utilizes GraphQL for flexible data fetching, allowing clients to request specific data structures.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Utilizes load balancers to distribute incoming network traffic across multiple servers to ensure reliability and scalability.
data.technical_spec: Hardware load balancers, cloud-based solutions, round-robin algorithms.
